item.description:
Bug Fixes

  • Audio Device Disconnection Reliability - Fixed a critical crash that occurred when physically unplugging or disconnecting an active USB microphone or audio interface (such as a RODECaster Pro) mid-capture during a meeting recording or dictation session. The app now handles device disconnection gracefully and transitions capture to the next-priority available audio device without crashing.

Bug Fixes

  • System Audio Error Recovery - Fixed a critical issue where the macOS app could freeze permanently on dictation start if the system audio daemon (coreaudiod) became unresponsive. The app now detects this condition and gracefully displays a "System Audio Error" message, allowing you to retry without needing to force-quit the application.

What's New

  • Meeting Recording Optimization - Reduced resource utilization during meeting recordings by capping parallel audio capture streams. The app now uses a single built-in fallback microphone (instead of up to four redundant devices) and limits per-app system audio capture to the two most active and relevant apps. This significantly improves macOS system responsiveness and CPU usage during active sessions.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed a display bug where the recording overlay panel could become invisible or fail to render after the macOS system wakes from sleep due to an animator failure.
